Tests the behavior of Math.pow with negative base and negative infinity exponent.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Math.pow` function in JavaScript. It verifies that raising a negative number, `-0.3`, to the power of negative infinity, `-Infinity`, results in positive infinity, `Infinity`. This test ensures that the `Math.pow` function conforms to the expected mathematical behavior when dealing with negative bases and infinite exponents. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical operation and its expected result.
